briefdescription.para: The IPIPSU configuration table, sized by the number of instances defined in xparameters.h.
Looks up the device configuration based on the unique device ID/BaseAddress.

detaileddescription.para: The XIpiPsu_ConfigTable[] contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: contains the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A pointer to the configuration found or NULL if the specified device ID/BaseAddress was not found. See xipipsu.h for the definition of XIpiPsu_Config.
In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the Instance pointer based on a given Config Pointer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on
Device configuration structure containing required hardware build data
Base address of the device. If address translation is not utilized, this parameter can be passed in using CfgPtr->Config. BaseAddress to specify the physical base address.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful XST_FAILURE in case of failure

briefdescription.para: Resets the given IPI register set.

para.verbatim: This function can be called to disable the IPIs from all the sources and clear any pending IPIs in status register

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance

briefdescription.para: Triggers an IPI to a Destination CPU.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Mask of the CPU to which IPI is to be triggered

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful XST_FAILURE if an error occurred

briefdescription.para: Polls for an acknowledgement using Observation Register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Mask of the destination CPU from which ACK is expected
Count after which the routines returns failure

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful XST_FAILURE if a timeout occurred

memberdef.argsstring: (XIpiPsu *InstancePtr, u32 SrcCpuMask, u32 *MsgPtr, u32 MsgLength, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XIpiPsu_ReadMessage

briefdescription.para: Read an Incoming Message from a Source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Device Mask for the CPU which has sent the message
Pointer to Buffer to which the read message needs to be stored
Number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
Type of buffer (XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_MSG or XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_RESP)

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful XST_FAILURE if an error occurred

memberdef.argsstring: (XIpiPsu *InstancePtr, u32 DestCpuMask, const u32 *MsgPtr, u32 MsgLength, u8 BufferType)
memberdef.name: XIpiPsu_WriteMessage

briefdescription.para: Sends a Message to Destination.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to current IPI instance
Device Mask for the destination CPU
Pointer to Buffer which contains the message to be sent
Number of messages (each message is 4bytes)
Type of buffer (XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_MSG or XIPIPSU_BUF_TYPE_RESP)

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful XST_FAILURE if an error occurred

briefdescription.para: Message type buffer.
Response buffer.
Index where the CRC is stored.
Size of the word 0 to word 6.
CRC error occurred.
Enable CRC.
Maximum message length.
Reads the register specified by the base address and offset.

parameterdescription.para: Base address of the IPI instance
Offset of the register relative to base

simplesect.para: C-style signature u32 XIpiPsu_ReadReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: Writes a value into a register specified by base address and offset.

parameterdescription.para: Base address of the IPI instance
Offset of the register relative to base
32-bit value that is to be written into the specified register

simplesect.para: C-style signature void XIpiPsu_WriteReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: Enable interrupts specified in Mask.

detaileddescription.para: The corresponding interrupt for each bit set to 1 in Mask, will be enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Contains a bit mask of interrupts to enable. The mask can be formed using a set of bitwise or'd values of individual CPU masks

simplesect.para: C-style signature void XIpiPsu_InterruptEnable(XIpiPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Mask)

briefdescription.para: Disable interrupts specified in Mask.

detaileddescription.para: The corresponding interrupt for each bit set to 1 in Mask, will be disabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Contains a bit mask of interrupts to disable. The mask can be formed using a set of bitwise or'd values of individual CPU masks

simplesect.para: C-style signature void XIpiPsu_InterruptDisable(XIpiPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Mask)

briefdescription.para: Gets the STATUS REGISTER of the current IPI instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: Returns the Interrupt Status register(ISR) contents
User needs to parse this 32-bit value to check the source CPU C-style signature u32 XIpiPsu_GetInterruptStatus(XIpiPsu *InstancePtr)

briefdescription.para: Clears the STATUS REGISTER of the current IPI instance.

detaileddescription.para: The corresponding interrupt status for each bit set to 1 in Mask is cleared.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.
Mask corresponding to the source CPU*

simplesect.para: This function should be used after handling the IPI. Clearing the status will automatically clear the corresponding bit in OBSERVATION register of Source CPU C-style signature void XIpiPsu_ClearInterruptStatus(XIpiPsu *InstancePtr, u32 Mask)

briefdescription.para: Gets the OBSERVATION REGISTER of the current IPI instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the instance to be worked on.

simplesect.para: User needs to parse this 32-bit value to check the status of individual CPUs C-style signature u32 XIpiPsu_GetObsStatus(XIpiPsu *InstancePtr)
